raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/2023 I used my XXXX XXXX XXXX Amex Card to pay for a car part and installation. The mechanic failed to show on XXXX occasions, and finally texted to say they would not be ordering the part or returning to install it. I tried for weeks to contact the merchant, and even filed a state level complaint with the attorney general 's office without resolution. I finally contacted Amex, who suggested a dispute. I received a denial. I have since appealed, since an agent indicated the correct dispute reason would be " expected goods and services not received '' instead of the original " not satisfied with goods or services. '' to date, I paid for a service I never received, and have not received a credit or refund. Although the original dispute was filed within the filing period, the second dispute was filed recently once I noticed it had not been resolved. Ref number is XXXX and is for {$200.00}.
